productName: Thunder Stix-Tilted-DOH-Glass Tip PreRoll 3-Pack (3.6g) / Hash Burger (IH)
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Hash Burger and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of ammonia, pepper, and cheese, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
